name: template_4
code:
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local NAME = "{{XP_NAME}}"
local function setup(plr)
	local ls = plr:WaitForChild("leaderstats")
	local v = ls:FindFirstChild(NAME) or Instance.new("IntValue")
	v.Name = NAME
	v.Value = v.Value
	v.Parent = ls
end
Players.PlayerAdded:Connect(function(p) task.defer(setup, p) end)
-- Example grant: fire a RemoteEvent from client with validation in production
